selectionNotes: Picked the clearest wedges with immediate budget pain, policy tailwinds, and repeatable GTM.

selectedIdeas.pitch: Cuts AI inference spend by routing each request to the cheapest model and GPU mix that still meets SLAs.
selectedIdeas.selectionRationale: Strongest near-term spend pressure, clearest ROI, and direct fit to the strategic compute signal.

selectedIdeas.pitch: Helps regulated teams launch local AI stacks with residency, governance, and audit controls in weeks.
selectedIdeas.selectionRationale: Best wedge on regional AI sovereignty, with policy-backed demand and sticky compliance workflows.

selectedIdeas.pitch: Startup graph for universities and VCs that maps spinouts, people, grants, patents, and traction.
selectedIdeas.selectionRationale: Clear institutional buyer, repeatable data product, and strong pull from ecosystem tooling signals.

rejectedIdeas.reason: Interesting but buyer urgency is narrower than inference optimization.
Too broad and weakly differentiated against existing cloud and marketplace players.
Crowded category with limited moat versus specialized graph and diligence tools.
